Parties: Northbridge Markets plc (Company No. 00999999; LEI: 0TESTNORTHBRIDGE0000; provisional ISIN for consideration shares: GB00-TEST-0000) and GreenLedger Platforms Ltd (Company No. 00444444).
Transaction: Proposed acquisition by Northbridge of 51% of the issued share capital of GreenLedger via subscription for new ordinary shares; this intention is not yet announced and constitutes inside information under UK MAR until an RNS is released.
Listing/Regulatory: Northbridge is admitted to the Main Market of London Stock Exchange and is FCA-authorised; transaction subject to UK Listing Rules, DTR 2.2, and any applicable change-in-control notifications.
Consideration: Structure and price to be agreed; no cash amounts are set in this draft; any ESG-linked or crypto-related earn-out mechanics are illustrative only for training purposes.
Conditions precedent: Satisfactory confirmatory due diligence; no material adverse change; customary FCA and competition clearances; completion documentation to include clean team and information barrier protocols.
Commercial framework: Non-binding heads to explore enterprise crypto custody services and climate-data integrations; references to “staking”, “token” and “carbon score” herein are for product training and marketing copy only and do not describe live services.
Cyber and IT: Parties acknowledge a tabletop cyber incident drill schedule and adopt a shared response playbook; this is an operations-only programme and does not indicate any live breach.
Exclusivity: 60-day mutual exclusivity on negotiations; a draft clause envisages a 12-month exclusive supply of GreenLedger’s climate-data API to Northbridge’s ESG analytics unit, which has not been publicly announced.
Governance: Northbridge to nominate two directors post-completion; board observer rights for GreenLedger during integration; employee consultation to follow UK practice and any TUPE analysis (if applicable).
Compliance: Insider-list procedures per UK MAR Art. 18 will be maintained by both parties; sample insider list templates and watch-list/blackout definitions in this pack are part of internal education and not indicative of live restrictions.
Market conduct: No tipping, wall-crossing only via Compliance; information barriers to be observed; any communications to the market to be via RNS through an FCA-approved Primary Information Provider.
Conditions subsequent: Integration plan to include climate-risk reporting alignment (TCFD-style) and crypto-asset risk statements for institutional clients; these statements are marketing copy samples and not binding commercial commitments.
Public information: Each party may refer to previously announced sustainability initiatives and sandbox pilots in generic terms; no unpublished performance metrics or forecasts are included in this draft.
Notices/Contacts: All queries to role mailboxes only — legal@northbridgemarkets.example; corpfin@greenledger.example; general enquiries may use a public helpline listed on the FCA website (placeholder: 0800 000 0000).
